title: shark_override_verify status
description: Written by ~/.hermes/scripts/shark_override_verify.sh after every shark_market_open run. Read by GET /api/ops/shark_override_health and surfaced on the operator dashboard via the SharkOverrideHealthLive card.

regime.description: Market regime parsed from the cron output (e.g. BEAR_VOLATILE, BULL_QUIET). Null if no regime line was found.

override_expected.description: True when regime contains BEAR (the paper-mode override only applies in BEAR regimes).

override_applied.description: True if the cron output contained the 'PAPER MODE: overriding BEAR_*' marker emitted by shark.data.market_regime.

candidates_evaluated.description: Distinct symbols that appeared in candidate decision lines (rejected/EXECUTE/Claude-decided/TFT_GATE/Guardrails).

candidates_passing_override.description: Distinct symbols that cleared all gates and reached the EXECUTE log line (confidence >= 0.85, R:R floor, TFT gate).

trades_placed.description: Trades actually sent to Alpaca (Bracket order placed lines), or fallback heuristic of EXECUTE - DRY-RUN.

status.description: healthy: override fired or wasn't expected; degraded: 1-2 stalled runs; stalled: 3+ consecutive runs with override expected but no trade placed; unknown: no cron output yet.

stalled_runs.description: Consecutive runs where regime=BEAR, candidates were evaluated, but zero trades placed. Resets to 0 on a real trade or non-BEAR regime.

last_trade_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last shark_market_open run that placed a trade. Null until the override has fired at least once on this paper account (see HANDOFF.md PRE-CONDITION).

reason.description: Human-readable summary of why status is healthy/degraded/stalled.

checked_at.description: ISO timestamp when this verifier run completed.

source_file.description: Absolute path of the cron output file that was parsed.
